transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you attending the library workshop on academic databases tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. I want to learn how to find reliable sources for my research paper.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman attending the workshop?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman attending the workshop?

choices.text: To learn how to find reliable research sources.
To apply for a library job.

questions.explanation: She says she wants to learn how to find reliable sources for her research paper.
questions.evidence: I want to learn how to find reliable sources for my research paper.
